deep_dive.title: Dustin: Draft-Augmented Sparse Verification for Efficient Long-Context Generation with Speculative Decoding
deep_dive.abstract: While speculative decoding improves inference throughput for multi-batch long-context Large Language Models (LLMs), its efficiency is often limited by a verification bottleneck where Key-Value (KV) cache loading dominates latency. Existing compression methods fail in this regime: static eviction incurs accuracy loss due to saliency shift, while dynamic selection introduces prohibitive computational overhead during the verification path. We propose Dustin, a sparse verification framework designed for long-context speculative decoding. Dustin integrates lookahead signals from the draft model with historical attention from the target model to identify critical tokens with high fidelity across multi-step verification windows. To reduce recomputation latency, this approach further employs a sparse estimation scheme that restricts importance scoring to a minimal subset of attention heads. Evaluations on PG-19 and LongBench with Qwen2.5-72B demonstrate that Dustin achieves a 27.85x speedup in self-attention and a 9.17x end-to-end decoding speedup at a 32k sequence length, all with negligible accuracy degradation.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Sparse verification for speculative decoding in LLMs
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 面向大语言模型投机解码的稀疏验证方法
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 面向大语言模型投机解码的稀疏验证方法
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 面向大语言模型投机解码的稀疏验证方法
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Dustin proposes a sparse verification framework for long-context speculative decoding that integrates draft lookahead to identify critical tokens, reducing KV cache loading latency.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对长上下文投机解码中验证阶段KV缓存加载成为瓶颈的问题，本文提出Dustin稀疏验证框架。该框架结合草稿模型的超前信号与目标模型的历史注意力，在多步验证中高保真地识别关键标记，从而减少KV缓存访问。实验表明，Dustin在保持准确性的前提下显著提升多批次长上下文推理的吞吐量。为长序列投机解码提供了高效的验证方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对长上下文投机解码中验证阶段KV缓存加载成为瓶颈的问题，本文提出Dustin稀疏验证框架。该框架结合草稿模型的超前信号与目标模型的历史注意力，在多步验证中高保真地识别关键标记，从而减少KV缓存访问。实验表明，Dustin在保持准确性的前提下显著提升多批次长上下文推理的吞吐量。为长序列投机解码提供了高效的验证方案。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 基于宽松验证的大预言模型投机解码方法, especially work that connects or combines: speculative decoding for large language models; relaxed verification mechanism in speculative decoding; approximate matching for speculative execution; relaxed acceptance criteria for token generation; lossy verification in LLM inference acceleration; accelerating LLM inference with speculative decoding; speculative decoding methods with relaxed verification for LLMs; approximate token matching in speculative decoding frameworks; improving speculative decoding efficiency via relaxed acceptance.

deep_dive.title: Forget Without Compromise: Nexus Sampling for Streaming KV-Cache Eviction Under Fixed Budgets
deep_dive.abstract: Long-context and agentic LLM workloads push the KV cache past any fixed memory budget, forcing the inference stack to permanently evict tokens at every step of a continuous-inference stream. Existing methods all share the same template, a per-step direct-attention score followed by deterministic top-$K$ selection, which converts a single below-cutoff step into an irreversible verdict and permanently erases any subtly important token that direct attention cannot single out from noise. To address this challenge, we propose Nexus Sampling, a training-free eviction method that pairs Nexus scoring, an iterative walk over direct attention that surfaces bridge tokens, with weighted reservoir sampling, which retains tokens with inclusion probability in place of deterministic top-$K$. Theoretically, we show that Nexus Sampling dominates deterministic top-$K$ in long-run survival of subtly important tokens. Empirically, at 80% KV cache eviction, Nexus Sampling matches dense attention within 1% on LongBench while outperforming top-$K$ baselines on retrieval-heavy tasks, with up to 10x smaller per-sequence cache memory.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: KV cache eviction for streaming LLM inference
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 流式LLM推理中的KV缓存驱逐方法
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 流式LLM推理中的KV缓存驱逐方法
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 流式LLM推理中的KV缓存驱逐方法
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Nexus Sampling, a training-free KV cache eviction method using iterative scoring and reservoir sampling to retain important tokens under fixed budgets for streaming LLM inference.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对长上下文和智能体LLM工作负载中KV缓存超出固定内存预算的问题，本文提出了Nexus Sampling，一种无需训练的缓存驱逐方法。该方法通过Nexus评分（迭代遍历直接注意力以发现桥接令牌）结合加权蓄水池采样，在流式推理中保留重要令牌。实验表明该方法避免了确定性top-K选择导致的永久性遗忘，实现了固定预算下的高效缓存管理。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对长上下文和智能体LLM工作负载中KV缓存超出固定内存预算的问题，本文提出了Nexus Sampling，一种无需训练的缓存驱逐方法。该方法通过Nexus评分（迭代遍历直接注意力以发现桥接令牌）结合加权蓄水池采样，在流式推理中保留重要令牌。实验表明该方法避免了确定性top-K选择导致的永久性遗忘，实现了固定预算下的高效缓存管理。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 大语言模型高效推理相关的论文检索, especially work that connects or combines: efficient large language model inference techniques; KV cache optimization and management for LLM; speculative decoding for faster LLM inference; structured and unstructured pruning for LLMs; efficient attention mechanisms like FlashAttention or PagedAttention; survey on efficient inference of large language models; state of the art techniques for LLM inference acceleration; optimizing throughput and latency for LLM serving.

deep_dive.title: Towards Fast and Effective Long Video Understanding of Multimodal Large Language Models via Adaptive Quasi-Gaussian Sampling
deep_dive.abstract: Long video understanding remains a daunting challenge for Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) due to the excessive computation and memory footprint. Thus, keyframe selection is often adopted to mitigate this shortcoming, which however still suffers from low flexibility and high noise due to its hard sampling principle. In this paper, we define video frame selection as a problem of Quasi-Gaussian Sampling, and propose an adaptive and training-free approach termed AdaQ. Inspired by the 3-$σ$ rule of Gaussian distribution, the objective of AdaQ is to achieve the optimal 3-$σ$ interval for different examples, i.e., a smaller 3-$σ$ interval for the local query and a larger one for the global query, thereby facilitating robust and adaptive frame sampling. To validate AdaQ, we apply it to four MLLMs with three embedding models. The extensive experimental results not only show its obvious performance gains over the default MLLMs and the SOTA keyframe selection methods, e.g., helping Qwen3-VL-8B outperform GPT4o by 15.8% on average by using only 64 frames, but also confirm its superior robustness and high efficiency for long-video understanding, e.g., only 1 hyper-parameter needs to be set.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: adaptive keyframe sampling to accelerate MLLM long video understanding
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 自适应关键帧采样加速MLLM长视频理解
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 自适应关键帧采样加速MLLM长视频理解
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 自适应关键帧采样加速MLLM长视频理解
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: AdaQ accelerates MLLM long video understanding by adaptive quasi-Gaussian frame sampling, reducing computation and memory without training.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 长视频理解中，MLLM面临巨大计算和内存压力。现有硬采样关键帧方法灵活性低且噪声大。本文提出AdaQ，一种无需训练的自适应准高斯采样方法，根据查询类型动态选择最优帧区间，有效降低计算量并提升理解效果。实验证明AdaQ在多个长视频基准上取得加速且保持准确性。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 长视频理解中，MLLM面临巨大计算和内存压力。现有硬采样关键帧方法灵活性低且噪声大。本文提出AdaQ，一种无需训练的自适应准高斯采样方法，根据查询类型动态选择最优帧区间，有效降低计算量并提升理解效果。实验证明AdaQ在多个长视频基准上取得加速且保持准确性。

quick_skim.title: Toward Low-Latency Vision-Language Models with Doubly-Correct Predictions in Egocentric Visual Understanding
quick_skim.abstract: The rapid rise of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) in egocentric visual understanding has made low-latency inference in human-robot collaborative (HRC) tasks increasingly critical. Weight pruning techniques developed for VLMs to shrink model size and computation can be readily applied to satisfy the efficiency demands of on-board processing and real-time interactive robotics. Moreover, safe human-robot interaction demands pruning strategies that preserve doubly-correct predictions; outputs must be both accurate and evidentially grounded to mitigate risks and ensure user trust. In this paper, we present a new study of VLM pruning through the lens of doubly-correct prediction. Our experiments surprisingly show that existing pruning methods often preserve the right evidence localization but undermine correct prediction. To address this, we propose a rationale-informed pruning strategy that better aligns evidence with decisions. Benchmark results on egocentric video datasets demonstrate that our method not only achieves the highest prediction accuracy but also outperforms existing approaches in attaining doubly-correct predictions. We aim to stimulate research on efficient and reliable VLMs, ensuring accuracy-driven advances align with the transparency, auditability, and safety required for responsible human-robot interaction and embodied intelligence.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Weight pruning for low-latency VLM inference
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 面向低延迟VLM推断的权重剪枝
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 面向低延迟VLM推断的权重剪枝
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 面向低延迟VLM推断的权重剪枝
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Studies VLM pruning for low-latency inference in egocentric visual understanding, focusing on preserving doubly-correct predictions (accurate and evidentially grounded).
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 在面向第一视角的视觉语言模型（VLM）推理中，低延迟与人机交互的安全性至关重要。本文研究VLM权重剪枝对双重正确预测（准确且可解释）的影响。实验发现现有剪枝策略可能破坏可解释性，并提出了兼顾效率与可信度的剪枝指导原则。该工作为低延迟VLM在机器人协作中的应用提供了安全加速的视角。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 在面向第一视角的视觉语言模型（VLM）推理中，低延迟与人机交互的安全性至关重要。本文研究VLM权重剪枝对双重正确预测（准确且可解释）的影响。实验发现现有剪枝策略可能破坏可解释性，并提出了兼顾效率与可信度的剪枝指导原则。该工作为低延迟VLM在机器人协作中的应用提供了安全加速的视角。

quick_skim.title: Deeper is Not Always Better: Mitigating the Alignment Tax via Confident Layer Decoding
quick_skim.abstract: Autoregressive generation in large language models (LLMs) conventionally decodes from the final layer, assuming that deeper representations yield more reliable next-token predictions. We revisit this assumption by revealing a recurring Guess-Refine-Perturb dynamic: early layers form coarse guesses, intermediate layers refine reasoning-relevant semantics, and final layers can perturb these refined predictions toward generic or alignment-preferred tokens. We introduce Confident Decoding, a training-free decoding strategy that dynamically selects the most reliable near-final layer through entropy-guided conservative backward search. We further provide a theoretical formulation of layer selection as an optimal stopping problem, showing that under bounded projection noise and dominant late-stage alignment perturbation, our search rule filters perturbation while bounding the loss relative to the oracle refinement layer. Experiments across dense and Mixture-of-Experts LLMs demonstrate consistent gains on challenging reasoning benchmarks, including GPQA-Diamond, Omni-MATH, and HLE, with zero memory overhead and less than 2% latency increase. These results suggest dynamically bypassing final-layer perturbations can unlock stronger reasoning behavior from aligned LLMs.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: training-free decoding strategy for LLM inference efficiency
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 无训练的解码策略提升LLM推理效率
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 无训练的解码策略提升LLM推理效率
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 无训练的解码策略提升LLM推理效率
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Confident Decoding selects the most reliable LLM layer via entropy-guided search to improve generation quality without training, offering a new angle for efficient inference.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文揭示了LLM自回归生成中深层可能带来对齐惩罚的现象，并提出了一种无需训练的解码策略——Confident Decoding，它通过熵引导的保守向后搜索动态选择最可靠的近最终层。实验表明该方法能有效提升生成质量，同时为LLM推理效率提供了一种不依赖传统KV缓存优化的新思路。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文揭示了LLM自回归生成中深层可能带来对齐惩罚的现象，并提出了一种无需训练的解码策略——Confident Decoding，它通过熵引导的保守向后搜索动态选择最可靠的近最终层。实验表明该方法能有效提升生成质量，同时为LLM推理效率提供了一种不依赖传统KV缓存优化的新思路。
